top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/04 - BEEDS User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Environment – Statistical Taxonomy v1.3.1 FINAL
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Few Japan firms take steps toward economic security, government paper finds
top_signals.summary: Only about 30% of Japanese companies have taken substantive measures to ensure economic security, such as diversifying procurement sources and strengthening cybersecurity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Parents Should Start Saving for Child's Education 'at Birth', Says Tricia Scarlata
top_signals.summary: Tricia Scarlata, Head of Education Savings at JPMorgan Asset Management, discusses college investing, 529 day, and missed opportunities for families saving for college. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Texas appoints CleanSpark exec, bitcoin miner CEO to Strategic Bitcoin Reserve committee
top_signals.summary: Texas is seeking a custodian to transition reserve assets from Blackrock's IBIT into direct bitcoin holdings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
Ventuals to compensate traders after pre-IPO SpaceX perps plunge 45% on Hyperliquid
top_signals.summary: Ventuals to compensate traders after faulty oracle data sent SPACEX perps down 45% on Hyperliquid, wiping $1.51 million.
